channel.title: playwright on Syaofox's Elysion
channel.description: Recent content in playwright on Syaofox's Elysion

item.title: Playwright 爬虫使用
item.description: 官方文档：Getting started | Playwright Python 参考链接：强大易用！新一代爬虫利器 Playwright 的介绍 安装 Playwrigth 会安装 Chromium, Firefox and WebKit 浏览器并配置一些驱动，我们不必关心中间配置的过
